day3_after_start.name: Me
day3_after_start.text: *After school. The school feels strangely quiet today.*

day3_after_riin.name: Riin
day3_after_riin.text: "Sit down. I made a health drink. A vitamin and herb blend."

day3_after_riin_2.name: Me
day3_after_riin_2.text: *Riin hands me a cup with pale purple liquid. A slightly odd smell.*

day3_after_riin_3.name: Me
day3_after_riin_3.text: *...Wait. Nurse Riin's hand is trembling very slightly. The hand holding the cup.*

day3_after_riin_drink_2.name: Me
day3_after_riin_drink_2.text: *I drank it. ...A bitter aftertaste lingers on my tongue. Wait, my vision is slightly...*

day3_after_riin_drink_3.name: Me
day3_after_riin_drink_3.text: *...The moment Nurse Riin turned away, I caught her expression. Relief? No. **Pain.** It vanished quickly.*

day3_after_riin_refuse.name: Riin
day3_after_riin_refuse.text: "...Is that so? Alright, I won't force you."

day3_after_riin_refuse_2.name: Me
day3_after_riin_refuse_2.text: *Nurse Riin takes the cup away. She's smiling, but her hand is still trembling.*

day3_after_sea_2.name: Han Sea
day3_after_sea_2.text: "I heard you were on the rooftop with Yuna, just the two of you. Someone told me."

day3_after_sea_truth.name: Me
day3_after_sea_truth.text: *Sea is smiling. She's smiling, but... her eyes aren't.*

day3_after_sea_truth_3.name: Me
day3_after_sea_truth_3.text: *Sea looks out the window. For a long moment.*

day3_after_sea_truth_4.name: Han Sea
day3_after_sea_truth_4.text: "...Sometimes I think about it. Why I'm doing this."

day3_after_sea_truth_5.name: Me
day3_after_sea_truth_5.text: *Sea stops talking and shakes her head. It looks like she was about to say something and swallowed it.*

day3_after_sea_truth_7.name: Me
day3_after_sea_truth_7.text: *Sea smiles again. This time her eyes are smiling too. But that moment just now... I can tell it wasn't an act.*

day3_after_sea_lie_2.name: Han Sea
day3_after_sea_lie_2.text: "...You're lying. I can tell right away when {name} lies."

day3_after_eunsu.name: Me
day3_after_eunsu.text: *Ms. Eunsu hands me a coffee. It's warm.*

day3_after_eunsu_2.name: Me
day3_after_eunsu_2.text: *Documents are spread out on the desk. It reads **'Transfer Student Management Registry'**. ...My eyes went to it.*

day3_after_eunsu_3.name: Me
day3_after_eunsu_3.text: *Ms. Eunsu drinks her coffee and looks at me. She doesn't put the documents away.*

day3_after_eunsu_peek.name: Me
day3_after_eunsu_peek.text: *Transfer student list. Dates written next to the names. Transfer date and... **'Processing Completion Date'**?*

day3_after_eunsu_peek_2.name: Me
day3_after_eunsu_peek_2.text: *Seventh row. 'Lee Seolhwa'. A date from one year ago. In the processing completion column, in red: **'FAILED'**.*

day3_after_eunsu_peek_3.name: Me
day3_after_eunsu_peek_3.text: *...Seolhwa? The girl sitting in the back row? Processing? Failed? My name is here too. Thirteenth row. The column beside the date is... **still blank**.*

day3_after_eunsu_peek_4.name: Homeroom Teacher
day3_after_eunsu_peek_4.text: "Were you looking at the attendance sheet?"

day3_after_eunsu_peek_5.name: Me
day3_after_eunsu_peek_5.text: *Ms. Eunsu is smiling. Holding her coffee. At ease. ...She knew I was looking. No — **she let me look**.*

day3_after_eunsu_peek_6.name: Homeroom Teacher
day3_after_eunsu_peek_6.text: "How thorough. It's a list I manage. Something like a transfer student adjustment progress report."

day3_after_eunsu_ignore.name: Me
day3_after_eunsu_ignore.text: *...It's not right to look at someone else's documents. I just drank my coffee.*

day3_after_eunsu_ignore_2.name: Homeroom Teacher
day3_after_eunsu_ignore_2.text: "Not interested? Your name is in there too, you know."

day3_after_eunsu_ignore_3.name: Homeroom Teacher
day3_after_eunsu_ignore_3.text: "It's a transfer student adjustment progress sheet. I wrote that {name}... is adjusting well."

day3_after_eunsu_ignore_4.name: Me
day3_after_eunsu_ignore_4.text: *She puts the documents in a drawer. Casually. But the words 'your name is in there too' stay with me.*

day3_after_alone.name: Me
day3_after_alone.text: *I took out my laptop and inserted the memory card.*

day3_after_alone_no_card.name: Me
day3_after_alone_no_card.text: *Quiet classroom. Time passed without anything special happening.*

day3_after_alone_2.name: Me
day3_after_alone_2.text: *Photos. Empty classrooms, cleared-out lockers, desks with names scratched off... And photos of documents taken in the faculty office.*

day3_after_alone_3.name: Me
day3_after_alone_3.text: *A document titled **'Subject List'**. Numbers and names in rows... most crossed out in red.*

day3_after_alone_4.name: Me
day3_after_alone_4.text: *The last line. **Number 07. My name is written there.** The red line... isn't there yet.*

day3_after_end.name: Me
day3_after_end.text: *Leaving school. The sunset is red. ...Red like blood.*
